oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Beef producers: What we want from our veterinarians
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Grant, Lydia
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: communications
partnership
collaboration
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Today’s livestock producers face unprecedented pressures; from rising input costs and emerging disease threats to grow­ing scrutiny around animal health and welfare practices. In this challenging environment, success depends on strong, trust-based partnerships with veterinarians. This paper ex­plores what beef producers value most in those relationships, emphasizing the need for effective communication, mutual respect, trust and a shared commitment to proactive animal health strategies.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 12-13
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
